title: goniopteris clypeata
intro: Goniopteris clypeata is a species of fern native to tropical Africa. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Goniopteris clypeata, such as infusions and decoctions, are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
